examples: It is worth mastering a second language in modern society.
Mastering tools and working with one's hands shapes people's thinking and behavior.
Praise won for mastering a skill suddenly puts one in the position of having everything to lose.
When it comes to mastering any skill, your experience, effort, and persistence matter a lot.
Iriver has partnered with HDtracks to provide users with albums encoded with Mastering Quality Sound.
